# Iruanê Anayru

She knows every stone, every fungus, and every crawling thing that dwells within the depths of the caverns.

> **Ancestry:** Fungril
> **Community:** Underborne
> **Role:** Scout

## Features

**Track:** Whenever an ally deals damage to an adversary, **place 1 token** on this card.

**Spore Veil:** **Spend 3 tokens** to make an ally within Close range _Hidden_ temporarily.

**Exposed Trail:** **Spend 3 tokens** to make an adversary within Close range _Vulnerable_ temporarily.

> **Design notes:** The name _Iruanê Anayru_ draws inspiration from the cultures and languages of Indigenous peoples of the Amazon Rainforest in Brazil.
